download_bytes_per_second.description: Per-download bandwidth limit in bytes per second; null means unlimited.
Per-download bandwidth limit in bytes per second; null means unlimited.

HmacAccessKey.description: MediaHub-HMAC-SHA256 signed request with timestamp, nonce, body hash, and signed headers.
HmacAccessKey.name: Authorization

SignedMediaToken.description: Short-lived token bound to one media revision and response policy.
SignedMediaToken.name: token

UploadCapability.description: Short-lived capability bound to PUT and one upload session.
UploadCapability.name: token

info.description: Docker Profile V1 API contract. Authenticated resource ownership is always derived from the session or API key, never from client-supplied owner IDs. Every response includes X-Request-Id; JSON errors additionally expose error.request_id.
info.title: MediaHub API

get.summary: List media or Bucket-scoped virtual directories with a stable cursor

post.summary: Upload media with multipart form data
Run or schedule a media batch operation

put.summary: Upload content using a short-lived capability

delete.summary: Delete an empty Bucket by path

get.summary: List objects or virtual directories by Bucket path

put.summary: Create a private Bucket by path

get.summary: Read object content by Application, Bucket, and Object Key

head.summary: Read object headers by Application, Bucket, and Object Key

post.summary: Create a signed object URL by path

put.summary: Create immutable object content by path
